text: In the first scene, I feel a quiet sense of anticipation and curiosity—sterile, ordered surroundings make me more attuned to subtle movements and sounds, inviting reflection on space and solitude. In the second scene, I am energized and inquisitive, as the vivid colors and displays stimulate my thoughts about innovation, collaboration, and the intricate dance between humans and technology. Both environments provoke wonder, but each in its own unique way—one through silence, the other through stimulus.
